sessionStart.description: Load workflow guidance, investigate context, and apply stack rules before planning.

sessionEnd.description: Run build and tests, and prepare PR output.
Generate final report and archive to .github/reports/.

userPromptSubmitted.description: Create a draft plan and enforce approval gate for non-trivial requests.

preToolUse.description: Before code-edit tools, verify guidance loading and rule application are complete.

postToolUse.description: After implementation steps, run lint/format checks.

errorOccurred.description: On errors, return to phase index, re-align phase order, and resume from the failing phase.
